August 15–17, 2025

Event Schedule

Three days of hacking, workshops, activities, and memories. Times are approximate — check back for the final schedule.

CeremonyWorkshopActivityMealBreak

Friday, August 15

4:00 PM

Check-In & Registration

Activity

Main Lobby

Pick up your badge, swag bag, and find your team table.

6:00 PM

Opening Ceremony

Ceremony

Main Auditorium

Welcome remarks, sponsor spotlights, and hacking kickoff.

7:00 PM

Team Formation Mixer

Activity

Atrium

Find teammates, swap ideas, and lock in your project concept.

8:00 PM

Dinner

Meal

Cafeteria

Hot meals with vegetarian, vegan, and halal options.

9:00 PM

Intro to Web Dev

Workshop

Workshop Room A

Build your first website from scratch with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Speaker: Morgan Chen

9:00 PM

Design Thinking 101

Workshop

Workshop Room B

Learn how to identify user needs and prototype solutions rapidly.

Speaker: Quinn Anderson

11:00 PM

Meal

Cafeteria

11:59 PM
